action.text: SA 3964 fell when SA 3963 (the instructions of the motion to refer) fell.
Amendment SA 3964 proposed by Senator Thune to Amendment SA 3963 (the instructions of the motion to refer). (consideration: CR S8656) To improve the bill.
Senate amendment proposed (on the floor): Amendment SA 3964 proposed by Senator Thune to Amendment SA 3963 (the instructions of the motion to refer).
